project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 0 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 1 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: Club leaders must be able to create and update events.
Students must be able to join events.
Students should receive reminder notifications for events.

constraints.text: Only club leaders and the student council are permitted to cancel events.

assumptions.text: The app should be easy to use, particularly for freshmen.

open_questions.text: Attendance analytics may be considered for future updates.

follow_up_questions: Clarification needed on the process for event cancellation.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Our school clubs need an app to publish weekly meeting schedules.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Club leaders should create and update events.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Students should join events and receive reminder notifications.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: It should be easy to use for freshmen.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.

utterances.speaker: PM
utterances.text: Who is allowed to cancel events?

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.
